title: Wooden Scrubbing Brush Heavy Duty Hand Scrubber with Wood Stock and Stiff Natural Bassine Bristles - Ideal Wooden Floor Brush Tile Grout & Boot Cleaner Scrubbing Brush Heavy Duty (1)
features: Natural Wooden Scrubbing Brush - Wood stock with smooth hand grip in the traditional scrubbing brush shape make the hand scrub easy to hold and use
Stiff Hard Wearing Bristles - Firm natural bassine bristles mean the scrubbing brush is up to heavy duty tasks. Perfect for indoor or outdoor jobs

Remove Stubborn Stains and Dirt - The perfect cleaning brush for removing dirt and marks from many surfaces such as tiles and concrete flooring. Also perfect for scrubbing down garden furniture and other outdoor objects
The Perfect Size - 220mm long and 60mm wide the brush fits nicely into the palm of your hand. The bristles are 40mm long and give a nice firm scrubbing action which is needed when cleaning
Trusted Brand - Newman and Cole know what you want from a scrubbing brush and aim to deliver exactly that!
description: Product Description Newman and Cole Wooden Scrubbing Brush - Pack of 1 Equipped with stiff bassine bristles, this scrubbing brush tackles tough messes on tiles, patios, carpets, and concrete, making it a must-have hard bristle brush for demanding jobs. Multi-purpose Wooden Scrubbing Brush Ideal for deep cleaning driveways, patios, tiles, and stone. Natural bassine bristles deliver strong scrubbing power on tough surfaces. Previous page Heavy Duty Use For Tough Cleaning Ideal for deep cleaning driveways, patios, tiles, and stone. Natural Bristles Stiff Bassine Natural bassine bristles deliver strong scrubbing power on tough surfaces. Easy to Use Ergonomic Handle Comfortable to hold and easy to maneuver for extended cleaning sessions. Durable Material Solid Stock Built from high-quality, durable wood that withstands outdoor elements and frequent use. Next page 1 For Tough Cleaning 2 Stiff Bassine 3 Ergonomic Handle 4 Solid Stock Versatile Scrubbing Brushes Perfect for Patio, Driveway, Decking, Tiles/Stone etc Tackle tough grime with confidence using this heavy-duty Wooden Scrubbing Brush, ideal for outdoor and indoor cleaning. Designed with stiff bristle brush technology, this powerful scrubbing brush makes light work of dirt, moss, algae, and grease on tiles, patios, stone, and concrete. Whether you're deep cleaning your driveway or scrubbing tiles, this stiff hand brush delivers efficient, no-nonsense results. Is this scrubbing brush suitable for outdoor cleaning? Absolutely. This is a top choice for anyone needing a patio scrubbing brush or outdoor scrubbing brush to clean stone, concrete, and tiled surfaces. The stiff bristles are ideal for removing grime and moss. Can I use this as a tile cleaning brush in my bathroom or kitchen? Yes, it works great as a tile brush for scrubbing floors and walls. The stiff bristles cut through soap scum and grout stains effectively. Is the brush handle comfortable to hold for longer cleaning sessions? The solid wooden stock is shaped for a firm, ergonomic grip, making it an excellent hand scrubbing brush that won't slip or cause discomfort. Are the bristles strong enough for heavy-duty scrubbing? Yes, this is a scrubbing brush heavy duty built with tough natural bristles that resist wear and are perfect for scrubbing rough and porous surfaces. Can this be used on interior and exterior floors? Definitely. It’s perfect as a floor scrubbing brush for both indoor tiles and outdoor patios, and works equally well as a hard bristle brush for general floor cleaning or targeted spot-cleaning.
